"visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 18, 1440, 952], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Instructions:
1. Sit astride on the chair with a leg on either side, hands laid on the seat back.
2. Inhaling, bend your upper body backward. Slowly exhaling, push your chest upward. Chin up and keep deep breathing; maintain this position for 2 to 3 breaths.
3. Exhaling, bend forward with your spine curved. Totally relaxing your whole back and maintain this position for 2 to 3 breaths. 
4. Repeat the whole section for 3 to 5 times.

Functions:
1. Helps alleviate backaches; corrects hunchback and relieves discomfort caused by sedentary habits.
2.
